fields.title: Define JSONL memory schema and types with nano-id
fields.description:
Define the new memory entry schema with nano-id, timestamps, and content. Create TypeScript types and validation schemas.

Acceptance criteria:
- MemoryEntry type with id (nano-id), content, createdAt, updatedAt
- Schema validation using Effect Schema
- JSONL serialization/deserialization utilities
- Backwards compatibility helpers for migration
fields.notes: Implemented JSONL memory schema foundation: added Effect Schema-backed MemoryEntry with nanoid id + UTC timestamps, JSONL parse/serialize helpers, legacy markdown migration helpers, and focused format tests. Gate passes.
